name: a real standalone AKS token still activates the azure-platform workload type (whole-token match)
command: T=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "a .NET API on Azure with AKS" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'puts (JSON.parse(STDIN.read)["workload_classification"]["workload_types"]).join(",")'); echo "$T" | grep -qE 'azure-platform' && echo aks-token-fires 1>&2
